issues.description: KO action has condition type 'Always' but should be 'HasLifeOrLess' with value 2 to match 'if you have 2 or less Life cards'
Second effect object (Trigger with DrawCard/TrashFromHand) is completely extraneous and not present in card text. Should be removed.
KO target scope should specify 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with conditional application only when life condition is met
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is acceptable but should verify if 'DuringThisBattle' is more precise for counter effects
